title: Vehicle Rollover (Speeding)
description: Flatbed truck carrying $200k in drilling bits rolled over while rounding a sharp curve. Driver was exceeding posted speed limit and fleet speed cap.
root_cause: Driver error and failure to comply with IVMS speed restrictions
vendor_actions_taken: Fired driver but took 4 days to provide a replacement truck for cargo recovery
business_impact: High - $50k in equipment damage, 3-day drilling delay
follow_up_actions: Formal safety notice sent to vendor
Audit requested of all vendor driver logs

title: Lost Cargo - Spares Depot
description: Consignment of 4 pump units was 'mis-located' at the vendor's main distribution hub. Items were missing for 6 days.
root_cause: Manual inventory error at transit hub
vendor_actions_taken: Found cargo after intensive search but offered no explanation for tracking system failure
business_impact: Medium - site delay, increased rental costs for temporary pump
follow_up_actions: Penalty clause for lost/delayed cargo invoked
